section_name: Department Certification of Inspection Stations for Political Subdivisions and State Agencies
text:
(a) The department may certify a vehicle maintenance facility owned and operated by a political subdivision or agency of this state as an inspection station.

(b) An inspection station certified under this section is subject to the requirements of this chapter applicable to another inspection station, except as otherwise provided by this chapter.

(c) The facility may inspect only a vehicle owned by the political subdivision or state agency.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.004 — Department Certification of Inspection Stations for Political Subdivisions and State Agencies

(a) The department may certify a vehicle maintenance facility owned and operated by a political subdivision or agency of this state as an inspection station.

(b) An inspection station certified under this section is subject to the requirements of this chapter applicable to another inspection station, except as otherwise provided by this chapter.

(c) The facility may inspect only a vehicle owned by the political subdivision or state agency.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 18, eff. March 1, 2015.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may certify a vehicle maintenance facility owned and operated by a political subdivision or agency of this state as an inspection station.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An inspection station certified under this section is subject to the requirements of this chapter applicable to another inspection station, except as otherwise provided by this chapter.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The facility may inspect only a vehicle owned by the political subdivision or state agency.
